Module 6:
Sales Video Mechanics
!
Executive Summary
Sales Video Rule #1: The offer in your sales video is all about the
Transformation
How to script out your video
1. 	Open up with the big promise
2. 	Show authority - this is a great place for proof and testimonials
3. 	Start to pull in story - whether it’s your story or the story of your
students
4. 	You want to foreshadow urgency if you can
1. 	You want to have scarcity or urgency in your offer.
5. 	Make your offer and cover your features and benefits in here
6. 	Talk about your “stuff” (the deliverables)
7. 	You can offer bonuses and then do the revelation of price
1. 	I like to talk about the bonuses they get first
8. 	You want to talk about price from a position of authority
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

9. 	You often want to make an apples to oranges comparison - e.g. if
it’s information you want to compare to the price of a university
degree in the same program
10. “Here’s what to do now”: you’re going to describe the process
they’re going to go through to actually buy from you
11. “Put in your details and hit the add to cart button…etc.” - be
specific
12. Immediately after you have to create urgency
1. 	You always need some type of urgency
2. 	Even if it's only, “Hey, we have this launch special here and
we’re only going to keep this special open a few days and
after that then either the price is going to go up or these
bonuses are going to go away or I’m going to pull the offer
off the market and you’re not going to be able to get
anymore.”
13. Call to action - tell them now is the time to buy
14. Surprise bonus - not necessary but a nice to have and do
15. Risk reversal or talk about your guarantee - this alleviates any
concerns after hearing about price
16. Revisit the call to action
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 3 --

1. 	Come back to where you’re closing on them, where you
say, “Now is the time to act. Click that button!”
Some final notes…
Do not assume that your viewer watched your prelaunch content. Before
you shoot the video, I really want you to think about how your product will
transform their life.
Shoot the video with confidence and authority - this is key!
And finally, a few mechanics to mention about your video. You want to hide
the buy now button until the call to action. On the last day of your launch
you don’t want to hide that buy now button.
You want to test hiding the video controls vs. displaying them. And also
make sure to add a scarcity banner (a countdown timer works well) at the
top of your page when approaching end of launch.
Use these mechanics in your sales video and you’ll be far ahead of the
rest!
!
